/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/ar qc libragger_core.a CMakeFiles/ragger_core.dir/src/chat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ragger_core.dir/src/client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ragger_core.dir/src/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ragger_core.dir/src/embedder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ragger_core.dir/src/tokenizer_wrapper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ragger_core.dir/src/sqlite_backend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ragger_core.dir/src/bm25.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ragger_core.dir/src/import.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ragger_core.dir/src/memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ragger_core.dir/src/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ragger_core.dir/src/inference.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ragger_core.dir/src/api_formats.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ragger_core.dir/src/logs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ragger_core.dir/src/auth.cpp.o
/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/ranlib libragger_core.a
